import React from "react"; import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; export default function HomePage() { const navigate = useNavigate(); return (
Reusable KYC for Web3

Verify once. Reuse everywhere.

The Decentralized KYC Reuse Platform lets users complete KYC a single time with a trusted issuer and then prove compliance across any integrated dApp using a privacy‑preserving on‑chain credential.

1‑time KYC Eliminate repeated onboarding across exchanges and DeFi apps.
Multi‑issuer Support for multiple regulated KYC providers on one network.
On‑chain proof Soulbound‑style credential with levels & expiry, no PII stored.
KYC once → Access CEX, DeFi, NFT, and fintech services seamlessly.

What this platform does

We separate the heavy KYC process from every individual service. Users complete verification once with a trusted issuer. The issuer mints a non‑transferable credential to the user’s wallet that other platforms can verify on‑chain in a single call.

How it works under the hood

A multi‑issuer Solidity smart contract stores only a boolean, KYC level, and expiry for each wallet. Issuers manage credentials via the Issuer Portal. Any dApp can integrate by calling isVerifiedAtLevel(address,uint8) before allowing access to sensitive features.

Why this is beneficial

Users avoid repeated KYC fatigue and reduce the number of places that store their documents. Issuers keep control over revoked or expired credentials. Service providers get a simple API to stay compliant while keeping UX smooth.

Who can use this network

Centralized exchanges, lending platforms, on‑ramp / off‑ramp providers, NFT marketplaces, and even traditional fintech applications can all plug into this identity layer to verify users once and reuse that proof everywhere.

); }
